{{CargoRelic
|name=Glass Coffin
|rank=AA
|affct=FTH
|birthday=01-25
|source=Fragment Crafting (3.8%), Lottery Machine (0.08%), Wishing (0.35%), Soul Chest (1.5%), Expert Scrolls (0.95%)
|description=On Jan 25, 3000 BC, Hades, the King of Underworld, kept his Queen Persephone in a crystal coffin. 

As everything in the world was drying up, Demeter, the goddess of Abundance, had to meet the Queen of the Underworld. To make her stay, Hades hid his queen in a crystal coffin. But Demeter found the crystal coffin and took her away by using 6 pomegranates. After the Queen left the underworld and returned to the world, living things revived and grew, and mankind could live happily.
|fame=44
|art=44
|fth=68
|civ=41
|tech=31
|ss1=Demon Minion Cloning SPD +2%<br>Per 30 Demon Minions in battle, Troop HP +40
|ss2=Demon Minion Cloning SPD +3%<br>Per 30 Demon Minions in battle, Troop HP +80
|ss3=Demon Minion Cloning SPD +4%<br>Per 30 Demon Minions in battle, Troop HP +120
|ss4=Demon Minion Cloning SPD +6%<br>Per 30 Demon Minions in battle, Troop HP +200
|ss5=Demon Minion Cloning SPD +8%<br>Per 30 Demon Minions in battle, Troop HP +280
|ss7=Demon Minion Cloning SPD +8%<br>Per 30 Demon Minions in battle, Troop HP +280<br>Demon Minion Cloning SPD +7% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Arena skill II.png|50px]] Place in Snail Arena Compass: In Snail Arena, Wind RES +15
|skill2=[[File:Arena skill II.png|50px]] Place in Snail Arena Compass: In Snail Arena, Wind DMG +60
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Purple Relics]]
[[Category:FTH Relics]]
[[Category:Purple FTH Relics]]
[[Category:Demon Minion Cloning Speed Boost]]
[[Category:Demon Minion HP Boost]]
[[Category:Snail Arena Compass Boost]]
[[Category:Wind RES Boost]]
[[Category:Wind DMG Boost]]
[[Category:Mutant Gene Speedup Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Lottery Draws]]
[[Category:Wraith Boost]]
